source_jobs.title: Social Media Manager & Content Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Sahara AI is a decentralized AI blockchain platform that prioritizes sovereignty and provenance of AI, ensuring security, equity, and accessibility for all users. Backed by top investors in AI and crypto, including Binance Labs, Pantera Capital, Polychain Capital, Sequoia Capital, Samsung, Matrix Partners, and many more, Sahara AI continues to push the boundaries of decentralized AI. Today, Sahara AI is trusted by 35+ leading tech innovators and research institutions, such as Microsoft, Amazon, MIT, Motherson Group, and Snap. Learn more at saharalabs.ai http://saharalabs.ai.



Our Vision

To create a future where AI is open, transparent, and accessible to all through democratizing access to AI resources and ensuring sovereignty of AI assets.



Our Values

 - Impact First, No Excuses

 - Think Big, Act Fast, Every Day is Day 1

 - Speak Up, Build Better

 - Integrity Always, Zero Compromise

 - Own it, Raise the Bar

 - Resilience Wins the Race





About the Role

We are looking for a Social Media Manager to lead, develop, and execute effective social media management and engagement strategies at Sahara AI. This role will work closely with the marketing and design teams to launch innovative social campaigns, scale our reach across platforms, and expand our audience globally. The Social Media Manager will create original written content, plan daily, weekly and monthly social campaigns, and optimize our content for various social channels and communities. The ideal candidate will be a savvy social media expert, well-versed in the latest trends and analytics platforms within the Web3 landscape.



Responsibilities

 - Social media strategy: Handle daily operations, and ensure smooth execution for Sahara AI’s social media channels

 - Audience Engagement: Foster and maintain a strong online community by responding to comments, messages and engaging with followers

 - Event Management: Organize and host events such as Twitter Spaces, AMAs, and community gatherings to deepen engagement

 - Data & Analytics: Monitor, analyze, and report on social media metrics to identify trends and refine strategies

 - Content Creation: Develop and execute a content calendar with creative posts, visuals, and videos that align with the Sahara brand voice and target audience

 - Stay informed about Web3 and AI trends to drive innovative community strategies



Basic Qualifications

 - 4+ years experience in social media marketing, with crypto marketing experience

 - Experience in social media marketing, channel management, content creation, copywriting and community engagement

 - Experience creating X/Twitter posts around specific crypto topics

 - Advanced knowledge of social media publishing tools, project management tools, major social channels (e.g. X, Discord, YouTube), and social analytics

 - Adaptability and ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment



Preferred Qualifications

 - Working knowledge of Figma

 - Proficient creative writing skills

 - Excellent verbal communication and ability to build rapport with diverse audiences, especially when hosting Twitter Spaces and other similar social media



Note: This is a full-time, 6 month contract position with potential to convert to full-time employment.



What We Offer

🤖 | Shape the future of AI and Blockchain with a global team of industry experts

⚙️ | Work closely with pioneering AI companies and startups

💰 | Competitive compensation

🏥 | Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits and vacation time

💻 | Opportunity for career growth and high impact

source_jobs.title: Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
About Us

Sahara AI is a decentralized AI blockchain platform that prioritizes the sovereignty and provenance of AI—ensuring security, equity, and accessibility for all users. Backed by Binance Labs, Pantera Capital, Polychain Capital, Sequoia Capital, Samsung, Matrix Partners, and more, Sahara AI continues to push the boundaries of decentralized AI. Today, Sahara AI is trusted by 35+ global innovators and research institutions, including Microsoft, Amazon, MIT, Motherson Group, and Snap. Learn more at saharalabs.ai http://saharalabs.ai.



Our Vision

To create a future where AI is open, transparent, and accessible to all by democratizing AI resources and ensuring sovereignty of AI assets.



Our Values

 - Impact First, No Excuses

 - Think Big, Act Fast, Every Day is Day 1

 - Speak Up, Build Better

 - Integrity Always, Zero Compromise

 - Own It, Raise the Bar

 - Resilience Wins the Race




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for an Account Manager to lead Sahara AI’s business growth and ecosystem partnerships in South Korea. You will drive strategic collaborations, enterprise engagement, and market expansion across AI and blockchain. This role will focus on identifying new business opportunities, securing partnerships with AI-driven organizations, and integrating Sahara AI’s decentralized solutions into Korea’s tech ecosystem.


You’ll work closely with the global partnerships and ecosystem teams to align local strategies with Sahara AI’s global vision. The ideal candidate is a connector and strategist—fluent in Korea’s AI and Web3 landscape, skilled in negotiation, and driven to scale Sahara AI’s presence across industry, academia, and government sectors.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Develop and execute strategic business growth plans aligned with Sahara AI’s global roadmap and local opportunities.

 - Identify, negotiate, and manage partnerships with AI companies, blockchain organizations, universities, and government bodies.

 - Explore collaborations with South Korean startups to integrate them into Sahara AI’s decentralized AI ecosystem.

 - Lead go-to-market strategies for new product launches and drive enterprise adoption.
   

 - Secure investment and funding opportunities to support Sahara AI’s initiatives in Korea.

 - Collaborate with global ecosystem teams to localize and implement business strategies.

 - Represent Sahara AI at industry events, conferences, and partner meetings.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years in business development, partnerships, or venture building (AI, blockchain, or tech preferred).

 - Strong network within Korea’s AI, blockchain, and innovation sectors.

 - Proven experience in strategic negotiation and relationship management.

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills.

 - Entrepreneurial mindset and ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

 - Fluent in Korean and proficient in English.

source_jobs.title: Community Manager
source_jobs.description:
About Us

Sahara AI is a decentralized AI blockchain platform that prioritizes the sovereignty and provenance of AI—ensuring security, equity, and accessibility for all users. Backed by Binance Labs, Pantera Capital, Polychain Capital, Sequoia Capital, Samsung, Matrix Partners, and more, Sahara AI continues to push the boundaries of decentralized AI. Today, Sahara AI is trusted by 35+ global innovators and research institutions, including Microsoft, Amazon, MIT, Motherson Group, and Snap. Learn more at saharalabs.ai http://saharalabs.ai.



Our Vision

To create a future where AI is open, transparent, and accessible to all by democratizing AI resources and ensuring sovereignty of AI assets.



Our Values

 - Impact First, No Excuses

 - Think Big, Act Fast, Every Day is Day 1

 - Speak Up, Build Better

 - Integrity Always, Zero Compromise

 - Own It, Raise the Bar

 - Resilience Wins the Race



About the Role

We are looking for a Community Manager to lead and expand Sahara AI’s presence in South Korea. You will be responsible for building, growing, and engaging Sahara AI’s Korea community across AI and blockchain through both online and offline initiatives. This includes developing grassroots programs, organizing meetups and hackathons, and activating developers, researchers, and enthusiasts to join the Sahara ecosystem. You’ll work closely with the global marketing and developer relations teams to localize campaigns, manage regional channels, and foster meaningful connections with partners, influencers, and thought leaders. The ideal candidate is a proactive connector who understands Korea’s AI and Web3 landscape and knows how to translate insight into action to drive measurable impact.



Responsibilities

 - Design and run community programs that drive awareness, participation, and retention.

 - Support in planning and hosting meetups, hackathons, and workshops; manage logistics and partnerships.

 - Recruit and lead local Ambassadors to promote Sahara AI within their networks.

 - Build relationships with Web3 KOLs, AI builders, and academic or student communities.

 - Manage Discord, Telegram, Naver Blog, and other local channels to sustain engagement.

 - Collaborate with Marketing to localize campaigns, content, and community updates.

 - Track growth metrics (members, engagement, contributors) and share insights.

 - Coordinate influencer partnerships and ensure consistent brand presence.

 - Support press outreach and local media communication.



Qualifications

 - 3+ years in community management, developer relations, or event operations (AI/Web3 preferred).

 - Strong understanding of Korea’s AI and blockchain ecosystem.

 - Skilled in social channel management and engagement strategies.

 - Proven event-planning experience from concept to execution.

 - Passion for decentralized AI and emerging technologies.

 - Fluent in Korean and proficient in English.

notes: No tech roles posted, high likelihood of being a startup
